title: Team closeout: Estuarine Fathoming Sail read-only GitHub PR lookup
body: Team closeout: read-only remote GitHub PR lookup complete. Boundary: oaknational/oak-open-curriculum-ecosystem PR metadata only. Evidence: gh pr list author filter app/sonarqube-agent and gh search --app sonarqube-agent both returned PRs 99, 103, 104, 105; title search for Sonar also found PR 97 but author was jimCresswell, so excluded. Claims: none opened. Source edits: none. Comms/seen-file drift only from required team-start watcher and heartbeat events. Watcher and heartbeat loop stopping now.
